name: chr1_olfactory_cluster_p
description: Chr1 olfactory receptor cluster (~50-60 OR genes), p-arm. Members of OR family with 60-95% intra-cluster identity. Rat has ~1300 OR genes total, the largest mammalian repertoire after mouse. Intra-cluster paralog identity 60-98%; recent tandem duplicates exceed 95% identity and require PSV mapping.
expected_copy_count: 30-150 OR genes per cluster; CNVs of small sub-blocks segregate at strain level
